method: pdftoppm 150dpi -> tesseract 5 (eng) over all pages; 44pp Gujarat brochure + 63pp Punjab gazette. Language check: both documents are English throughout -- low-OCR-yield pages were covers/blanks; the only vernacular content is the Punjabi script inside the Punjab state emblem. No translation required.

viksit_gujarat_industrial_policy_2026.structure: Investor chooses a COMBINATION of capital subsidy + interest subsidy + power tariff within a taluka-graded eFCI ceiling (Category-A talukas = higher rates than Category-B)

unit_definitions.MSME: GoI revised definition (micro <=2.5cr, small <=25cr, medium <=125cr P&M)
unit_definitions.Mega: >= INR 1,000 Cr AND 250 jobs AND thrust sector (each addl 200cr -> +50 jobs)
unit_definitions.Ultra-Mega: >= INR 10,000 Cr AND 3,000 jobs AND thrust sector (each addl 5,000cr -> +500 jobs)

MSME.capital: Micro 25%/35% of eFCI in 1y; Small&Medium 25%/35% over 5y
MSME.interest: 7% on term loan 5y up to 10% eFCI
MSME.power: INR 1/2 per unit 5y up to 25% eFCI

selected_thrust_special.sectors: sports goods & equipment, toys, footwear, robots, drones (+ as notified)

cross_cutting: EPF: 100% employer-contribution reimbursement -- 5y MSME, 8y Large-thrust, 10y Large-general/Mega/Ultra-Mega; caps INR 1,800/mo male, 2,500 female, 3,000 specially-abled
100% stamp duty + registration fee reimbursement (Ultra-Mega ONLY)
SC/ST entrepreneurs (Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar + Bhagwan Birsa Munda schemes): +5% on overall ceiling
thrust_sectors_21: Green energy ecosystem (green H2/ammonia, electrolyzers, RE equipment, battery storage, fuel cells)

rd_centres.early_bird_first_5_min_300cr: 50% capital subsidy (building capped 20% of investment) over 5y up to INR 50 Cr/yr; land 25% of allotment price/Jantri reimbursed; power INR 1/unit 5y; payroll subsidy INR 10,000/person/month 3y; IPR 100% up to 10k/filing 10y; patents 75% up to 15L each, 25 patents/10y
rd_centres.other_min_100cr: 25% capital subsidy up to INR 20 Cr/yr over 5y
rd_centres.dsir_inhouse: 50% of machinery/equipment/hw/sw cost up to INR 50 Cr

startups_women_esg.startups: sustenance INR 25k/mo 1y (30k with woman co-founder; 2y for high-tech/fintech/biotech/green); seed up to 30L (+10L societal impact, +10L high-tech/green; max 50L); interest subsidy additional 1% up to 9%; acceleration 5L; soft skills 1L; cross-border innovation hubs up to INR 1 Cr
startups_women_esg.women: +1% interest subsidy; rental assistance 75% of rent up to 3L p.a. for 5y; Return-to-Industry accelerator; WILC committee
startups_women_esg.workforce_housing: common dormitory/labour/working-women hostel: 80% of project cost up to INR 40 Cr (40% if industry/private-park built; 5km radius qualifies)
startups_women_esg.esg: wastewater recycling (>=70%) 50% up to 75 Cr (else 40% up to 50 Cr); common boiler 40% up to 30 Cr; cleaner production 50%/1 Cr MSME + 25%/2 Cr Large+; ZLD 50%/5 Cr per MLD MSME + 40%/7.5 Cr per MLD Large+

punjab_ibdp_2026.structure: Flexible menu within an OVERALL ceiling; one-time irrevocable choice of eligibility period 10-15y; annual ceiling = (overall - pre-production - stamp duty)/years, unused lapses; absolute cap INR 500 Cr

classification.Mega: FCI > 500 Cr; IT/ITeS > 250 Cr; first 3 GCCs with >1,000 direct jobs
classification.zones: Border districts (Pathankot, Gurdaspur, Amritsar, Tarn Taran, Ferozepur, Fazilka) + Kandi areas + General

priority_sectors_9: Textiles NIC-2025 div 13 (dyeing/finishing only with ZLD)

overall_ceiling.MSME_and_Large: up to 100% of eligible FCI, max INR 500 Cr
overall_ceiling.border_kandi_or_priority_sector: up to 125% of eligible FCI, max INR 500 Cr

fiscal_heads.stamp_duty: 100% exemption/reimbursement on land+building purchase or lease (new + expansion)
fiscal_heads.capital_subsidy: up to 20% of eligible FCI, cap INR 10 Cr, annual instalments over chosen period; modernization: 20% of P&M cap 10 Cr in 10 instalments, once per 5 years
fiscal_heads.electricity_duty: 100% exemption for the eligibility period (expansion: incremental consumption only)
fiscal_heads.net_sgst: 75% of Net SGST reimbursed for the eligibility period from DoCP (expansion: pro-rata on incremental sales); clawback on reduction/fraud with 18% interest
fiscal_heads.employment_generation_subsidy: INR 3,000/mo male + 4,000/mo female/SC/OBC/BC/PwD per Punjab-resident direct employee for 5y; qualifying floor: FCI >= 25 Cr AND >= 50 direct Punjab jobs
fiscal_heads.marketing: PSIEC Punjab Pavilion subsidized stalls; intl/national trade fair support by unit category
fiscal_heads.rd_testing: R&D/testing facility cost counts as FCI; cluster common R&D 50% up to 2.5 Cr, first 10 clusters FCFS
fiscal_heads.zld: new/expansion: ZLD cost = FCI component; existing standalone 20% up to 10 Cr in 10 instalments; cluster shared ZLD 20% up to 10 Cr; CETP->ZLD upgrade 20% up to 10 Cr (first 10 clusters each)
fiscal_heads.paddy_straw_boilers: 50% of cost -- new: INR 1 Cr/8TPH cap 5 Cr; switching: 1.5 Cr/8TPH cap 7.5 Cr; upgrading: 0.75 Cr/8TPH cap 2.5 Cr; OVER AND ABOVE the overall+annual ceilings; commissioning within 3y of notification; +100% stamp duty exemption on straw-storage land
fiscal_heads.cgtmse_fee: 100% guarantee-fee reimbursement, cap INR 3 lakh/unit/yr, 7y from DoCP (MSEs)
fiscal_heads.nse_emerge: financial assistance to MSMEs listing on NSE-EMERGE; ZED certification support (silver/gold); first-1,000-units support windows

punjab_ibdp_2026.service_sector: only NEW service units eligible; exception: IT/ITeS and GCC expansions per sectoral policy
notes: Sectoral-policy ceilings prevail and count inside the overall ceiling
Departments to notify implementing schemes within 30 days of policy notification
Effective from date of gazette notification
